zh.lifeSummary: 當Isabel Cherleton於大約1308年出生在英國爾馬爾帕斯時，她的父親Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherleton41歲，母親Hawise de la Pole18歲。她於大約1309年與John Sutton II在英國英格蘭武斯特斯爾杜德利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1397年4月10日在英國斯塔福爾杜德利享年90歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Isabel Cherleton于大约1308年出生在英国爾馬爾帕斯时，她的父亲Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherleton41岁，母亲Hawise de la Pole18岁。她于大约1309年与John Sutton II在英国英格兰武斯特斯爾杜德利结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1397年4月10日在英国斯塔福爾杜德利享年90岁。

nameMeanings.name: Cherleton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Charlton
meanings: English (Northumberland and Durham): habitational name from North Charlton or Charlton near Bellingham (both Northumberland) or from any of the many other places so named (there are over ninety examples in England), from Old English Ceorlatūn ‘settlement (Old English tūn) of the peasants’. Old English ceorl denoted originally a free peasant of the lowest rank, later (but probably already before the Norman conquest) a tenant in pure villeinage, a serf or bondsman.

nameMeanings.name: Isabel
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a Spanish version of   Elizabeth  , which was coined by deletion of the first syllable and alteration of the final consonant sound to one that can normally end a word in Spanish. The name was imported into France in the early Middle Ages, and thence into England. It was a royal name, and its enduring popularity may have been enhanced by the fact that it was borne by a queen of England—  Isabella  (  1296–1358 ), daughter of  Philip IV  of France—even though she led a turbulent life and eventually had her husband,  Edward II , murdered.

variants.name: Isabell

variants.name: Isabelle
meanings: form of   Isabel  , now in frequent use in the English-speaking world.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Isabel Cherleton was born about 1308, in Malpas, Cheshire, England, her father, Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherleton, was 41 and her mother, Hawise de la Pole, was 18. She married John Sutton II about 1309, in Dudley, Worcestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 10 April 1397, in Dudley, Staffordshire, England, at the age of 90.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Isabel Cherleton est née environ 1308, à Malpas, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherleton, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Hawise de la Pole, avait 18 ans. Elle a épousé John Sutton II environ 1309, à Dudley, Worcestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 10 avril 1397, à Dudley, Staffordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 90 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Isabel Cherletonが約1308年にイギリスチェシュアイアマルプアスで生まれた時，父Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherletonは41歳，母Hawise de la Poleは18歳であった。約1309年にイギリスイギリスウオルセステルシュアイアダドリーでJohn Sutton IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1397年4月10日にイギリススタフォードシュアイアダドリーで90歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Isabel Cherleton(이)가 대략 1308년 영국 체실르 맬파스에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherleton(은)는 41세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Hawise de la Pole(은)는 18세였다. 그녀는 대략 1309년 영국 잉글랜드 워스스터실르 드들리에서 John Sutton II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1397년 4월 10일 영국 스태퍼드실르 드들리에서 90세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Isabel Cherleton nasceu aproximadamente 1308, em Malpas, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherleton, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Hawise de la Pole, tinha 18 anos. Ela casou-se com John Sutton II aproximadamente 1309, em Dudley, Worcestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 10 de abril de 1397, em Dudley, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, com 90 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Isabel Cherleton родилась около 1308 г. в местности малпас, чешир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John de Cherleton 1st Lord Cherleton было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Hawise de la Pole, 18. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Sutton II около 1309 г. в местности дудли, ворсестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 10 апреля 1397 г. в местности дудли, стаффордшир, Англия в возрасте 90 лет.
